task: LoudFace homepage redesign: 3 divergent directions -> iterative feedback rounds -> single flagship
feedback: Arnel: Option 1 'feels clean but still pretty immersive'. Loved: full-bleed indigo stage hero with floating real client browser-cards + glass pills, saturated indigo logo ticker (from Option 2), client-color work shelf, purple-glass Numbers band, Option 2's Build/Grow deep-card pair, Option 3's night-runway engagement. Killed along the way: all-white one-accent pages (dull), pastel slab washes (cheap), hero-only facelifts, crowded multi-focal sections.
rules: Stole FlowNinja's full-page color-stage language (deep fields, floating framed work, glass chips) and reskinned it to LoudFace's real brand: Neue Montreal/Satoshi/Geist Mono, indigo+wine palette, real Sanity client screenshots/logos/metrics. Twist = deep<->crisp stage rhythm instead of FlowNinja's continuous cobalt, with client-brand color plates as the categorical color layer.

task: restyle navbar dropdown mega-menu to v3
feedback: deep indigo stage matches the hero's immersive energy; closest to v3 for now (Arnel)
rules: steal: v3 deep-indigo stage (primary-950 panel + glass rows + Geist Mono labels from the homepage hero/cover); twist: brought the page's stage aesthetic into a nav mega-menu (glass icon tiles + hairline white ring)

feedback: deep-indigo scrolled bar matches the dropdown -> one nav system; kills the green-dark CTA (Arnel)
rules: steal: v3 deep-indigo stage; twist: the sticky header solidifies from transparent-over-hero INTO the night-indigo bar on scroll, unifying nav + dropdown into one deep-indigo world

feedback: Composite pick: B's spine won (hero left column, sourced-numbers ledger, achievements, FAQ design) but warmed with A's people sections (team-mosaic hero visual, team section, founder note, FAQ messaging). C rejected wholesale ('I like nothing'). All CTA sections rejected across all 3 ('All CTAs suck').
rules: Proof-led Geist-Mono ledger spine (six numbers, sources attached) fused with people-led warmth — real team photo mosaic as hero visual, founder note. Numbers carry credibility, faces carry trust.

feedback: Hero dives straight into how we price - loved. How-it-works, two-tracks, compare table all decent. Base skeleton for hybrid.
rules: Tiers float in the indigo hero stage - $5k/mo answered in first screen; About-v3 family vocabulary recomposed for pricing

feedback: Only zero-blocker surface in the full QA; electric hero + verbatim chrome done right in-batch; work-led spine (the work is the pitch)
rules: Shipped-site exhibits as gallery-wall objects: real browser frames + credited service chips + sourced outcomes; services argued through evidence, directory secondary
